violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
Walk-in cooler (produce) door gaskets were observed torn in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The coving in the meat area is in poor repair, observed missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the bakery area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The handwash sink in the meat area was observed leaking from bottom pipe and not operatable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs, crab) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauces, cream cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Cheesecake and egg custard was observed held at 48-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The door to the outside, located in receiving dock, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
At the time of inspection, ambient of dessert open air case was at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC took unit out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
Observed missing ceiling tiles above 3 bay sink and oven. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The fans in the walk-in cooler (dairy) has an accumulation of dust and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
